title: 06294_Decomposing_Uncertainty_for_Large_Language_Models_through_Input_Clarification_Ensembling
positive_examples: Improves the trustworthiness and reliability of LLMs
Reduces the likelihood of unintended usage or potential risks from LLMs
negative_examples: Possibility that LLMs may not exhibit the same level of calibration on particular downstream tasks
Dependence on the well-calibrated nature of LLMs for effective uncertainty quantification
